english translation text:
Go to sajdah
and recite the following
O Allah, all praise be to You;
the praise of those who thank You for their misfortunes.
All praise be to Allah for my great misfortune.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱرْزُقْنِي شَفَاعَةَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ يَوْمَ ٱلْوُرُودِ
english translation text: O Allah, (please) grant me the intercession of Al-Husayn on the Day of Coming (to You)
and make for me with You a firm step of honesty
with Al-Husayn and the companions of Al-Husayn

arabic text: ٱلَّذينَ بَذَلُوٱ مُهَجَهُمْ دُونَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
english translation text: who sacrificed their souls in defense of Al-Husayn, peace be upon him.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
